title: 1981-04-16_Pat_102.txt
key_claims: The suffering and death of the savior (Christ) is no longer a historical event happening to one man; it is a "macro-crucifixion" happening simultaneously worldwide to the entire ecosphere.

Tagore's incarnation is a cautionary warning. If humanity continues its toxic destruction, it will drive the divine presence (Valis) away. Tagore is dying now in order to save the ecosphere from this fate.
Dick understands his own timeline through God's "backward-working strategy": the 1974 epiphany of Valis in nature was a preemptive vision given so that he would understand the 1981 Tagore revelation.
The novel *VALIS* was thus completely prophetic; it served to foretell the coming of Tagore and to document the underlying premise of the Third Dispensation (that the Logos transubstantiates nature).
recurring_concepts: **The Macro-Body of Christ**: The ecosphere is literally seen as the Corpus Christi.
**The Forces of Darkness**: The military-industrial complex creating nuclear waste, parallel to the Roman Empire that crucified Jesus.
reading_excerpt: The suffering and death of the savior (Christ) is no longer a historical event happening to one man; it is a "macro-crucifixion" happening simultaneously worldwide to the entire ecosphere.
